name: First House
description: Sets tone for how a person introduces themselves to the world; rising sign filter for all experiences.

name: Second House
description: Reveals relationship to personal assets, skill cultivation, and sense of worth.

name: Third House
description: Describes everyday mental habits, sibling dynamics, and short-range logistics.

name: Fourth House
description: Shows private life, ancestry, and what feels like ‘home’.

name: Fifth House
description: Governs joyful risk-taking, personal projects, and matters of the heart.

name: Sixth House
description: Tracks routines, employment atmosphere, and body-mind maintenance.

name: Seventh House
description: What we project onto others, how we negotiate commitments, and the qualities we seek.

name: Eighth House
description: Deals with intimacy, collective assets, and psychological regeneration.

name: Ninth House
description: Reflects search for truth, higher learning, and big horizon choices.

name: Tenth House
description: Signals public roles, authority patterns, and vocational destiny.

name: Eleventh House
description: Covers friendships, causes, and how we plug into the social field.

name: Twelfth House
description: Speaks to unconscious patterns, solitude, and where we surrender control.
